title: Naidu To Visit Nellore, Attend Vontimitta Temple Rituals on Wednesday
description: In Nellore district, ₹128 crore will be distributed among 2.91 lakh beneficiaries, including ₹17.81 crore for 39,330 beneficiaries in Udayagiri constituency and ₹2.47 crore for 5,484 beneficiaries in Vinjamur mandal
